mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, price, stock FROM product WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
UPDATE product SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, price, stock FROM product
SELECT id, product_name, price, stock FROM product ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_name, price, stock) VALUES (#{productName}, #{price}, #{stock})
